case_title: HEIDI H. LAO VS. CURRENT GOVERNMENT et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-24-2011 CONTINUED TO DEC-05-2011 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-24-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2013 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Heidi Lao, Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2012 Continued To Jan-15-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Plaintiff Heidi Lao. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JAN-15-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2012 Continued To Nov-27-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-22-2012 Continued To Aug-28-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Heidi H. Lao, appearing on her own behalf. The OSC is re-set to 8/28/2012 at 2:00 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2012 Continued To May-21-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/21/2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Continued To Feb-06-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, the Court orders the matters off calendar, and the OSC is re-set to February 6, 2012. The Court reserves the right to impose sanctions until the next calling of the case. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Continued To Dec-05-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Aug-26-2011 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-24-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Heidi Lao, appearing on her own behalf. The OSC is ordered off calendar and dissolved. Proceedings not reported. (610)
